chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3347 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.14113/2021 2. For hearing of main case 17.12.2024 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shehzad, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Fahad Hussain Areejo advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent /SRB which is taken on record. Essentially the petition assails show cause notice dated 30.04.2021, issued by the Sindh Revenue Board. Per petitioner’s learned counsel the matter is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court in the case of Fatima Fertilizers (2020 PTD 484). Learned counsel for S.R.B. submits that such defence may be presented before the adjudicating authority and in the light thereof the show cause notice shall be decided in accordance with law. Learned counsel further states that pending such adjudication no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. It is jointly stated that the petition be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
